audience: Historical dashboard compatibility and future bulky-material routing only
runtimeLane: Retired; GPT retrieves current documentation directly from GitHub
purpose: Record that the planned Drive mirror of current repo documentation is retired.
target: No current-doc publication target; Drive remains the bulky-material lane
boundaries: Current documentation stays in GitHub and is retrieved from the repo.
Drive is limited to bulky payloads, exports, workbench outputs, and handoff bundles.
GitHub Issues remain execution authority and canonical source remains game truth.
checks: Keep the manifest entry list empty while the mirror remains retired.
Require explicit owner approval for any future Drive mutation.
Route current GPT context through the repo bridge and exact GitHub paths.
risks: Restoring the mirror would create a stale competing copy of GitHub documentation.
Uncurated Drive retrieval can mix bulky historical payloads with current game truth.
destinationPlan: Do not publish current repo documentation to Drive. Use the maintained distributed-surfaces registry only when a task explicitly needs a bulky off-repo payload.
